name: Integrated International School
tagline: An inclusive boutique school championing neurodivergent learners
description: Integrated International School (IIS) is a unique boutique school in Clementi that specialises in supporting students with learning differences, including ADHD, autism spectrum, dyslexia, and anxiety. With approximately 100 students, IIS offers an Australian curriculum in small class sizes of typically 4-8 students, ensuring highly individualised attention. The school provides a mainstream academic programme alongside integrated therapy and learning support services, including speech therapy, occupational therapy, and counselling, all delivered within the school day. IIS is one of the few international schools in Singapore specifically designed for inclusive education.

admission.process: IIS takes a personalised admissions approach. Families meet with the school team to discuss the child's needs, review previous assessments and reports, and develop a tailored support plan before enrolment.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions with flexible start dates throughout the year.

faqs.question: What makes IIS different from other international schools?
faqs.answer: IIS is specifically designed for inclusive education, offering integrated therapy services and very small class sizes (4-8 students) to support neurodivergent learners alongside mainstream students.

faqs.question: Do students at IIS sit for standardised exams?
faqs.answer: Yes. IIS follows the Australian curriculum and students can sit for standardised assessments appropriate to their level. The school provides accommodations and individualised support during exams.

seo.description: Integrated International School in Clementi: boutique inclusive school for neurodivergent learners. Australian curriculum, 1:4 ratio, integrated therapy. View 2026 fees and approach.
